title: Digital Photography I
description: Introductory digital photography: scanning, RAW processing, colour management, printing, and composite image-making.

title: Digital Photography II
description: Advanced digital photography building technical proficiency and a personalized artistic vision through workshops and major assignments.

siteDir: PHOT 398 – As Seen on Screens: Cyberspace & Image Economy/site
title: As Seen on Screens: Cyberspace & Image Economy
description: Remote studio course on digital image circulation, net art, and post-internet practices with an online research-creation project.

title: Advanced Workshop in Photography
description: Yearlong capstone studio for final-year students developing a sustained research-creation project through critiques and mentorship.
